title: Replace onTouchEnd with Pressable in OverlayToggle and ToggleGroup

changes.overlay-toggle.tsx: Replaced View+onTouchEnd with Pressable+onPress in OverlayToggleItem. Added android_ripple. Moved accessibilityRole/accessibilityLabel/accessibilityState to Pressable. Wrapped visual View inside Pressable.
changes.toggle-group.tsx: Replaced View+onTouchEnd with Pressable+onPress in ToggleGroupItem. Added android_ripple. Uses render function ({ pressed }) => to pass pressed state to getBackgroundColor.

lint.error: react-native plugin not found in ESLint config - pre-existing

tests.note: Test count differs due to test suite deduplication, no new failures introduced
